'''Firefolk''' was an old [[Gender/Legends|male]] who was part of a resistance on [[Samaria/Legends|Samaria]].

==Biography==
He was a tech-expert, and, along with [[Dinko (resistance)|Dinko]], helped [[Ferus Olin]] try to bring [[Bog Divinian]] away from becoming prime minister of Samaria. They were unsuccessful.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
